title: MotherOS Terminal
description: Schema for CRT terminal JSON files used by MotherOS. Each terminal defines a set of screens with text, menus, and images that players navigate.

id.description: Unique terminal identifier. Used in URLs and file paths.

name.description: Display name for the terminal (shown in builder UI).

entryScreen.description: Screen ID shown when the terminal first loads. Must match a key in 'screens'.

defaultHeader.description: Default header text shown at the top of every screen (unless overridden). Null to hide.

defaultHeaderFont.description: Google Font family name for the header. Falls back to terminal fontFamily.

defaultFooter.description: Default footer text shown at the bottom of every screen. Null to hide.

defaultFooterFont.description: Google Font family name for the footer. Falls back to terminal fontFamily.

defaults.description: Default visual/audio settings applied to all screens.

screens.description: Map of screen IDs to screen definitions. IDs are case-insensitive for navigation but preserved as written.

settings.description: Visual and audio settings for the CRT terminal. All fields are optional — unset values use system defaults.

colorGlow.description: Glow/bloom tint color (hex). Defaults to foreground color.

scanlineIntensity.description: Scanline darkness. 0 = off, 1 = fully opaque lines.

scanlineSpeed.description: Vertical scroll speed of scanlines. 0 = static.

slowTypeSpeed.description: Seconds between character reveals during text animation.

slowTypeBatchSize.description: Max characters revealed per tick (randomized 1 to this value).

fontFamily.description: Primary font. Use a Google Font name (loaded via index.html) or 'monospace'.

cursorChar.description: Character used for the blinking cursor.

typingSound.description: Filename from public/audio/ to play during text reveal (e.g. 'teletext.mp3').

typingSoundRate.description: Playback speed multiplier for the typing sound.

navSound.description: Filename from public/audio/ to play on navigation (e.g. 'digital-beep.mp3').

content.description: Ordered list of content blocks rendered top-to-bottom.

overrides.description: Per-screen setting overrides. Merged on top of terminal defaults. Null for no overrides.

header.description: Screen-specific header. Null to use terminal default.

footer.description: Screen-specific footer. Null to use terminal default.

value.description:
Text content. Supports inline formatting:
- /text/ for highlight color
- *text* for alert color
- Newlines create separate lines
- All text is displayed uppercase

links.description: Lines within this block that act as navigable links.

fontFamily.description: Override font for this block only.

divider.description: If true, draw a horizontal rule above this block.

line.description: Zero-based line index within the text block that is navigable.

target.description: Screen ID to navigate to when this link is activated.

id.description: Unique identifier for this menu block.

items.description: Menu entries. Each is a navigable line.

label.description: Display text for the menu item. Supports /highlight/ and *alert* formatting.

target.description: Screen ID to navigate to when selected.

fontFamily.description: Override font for this menu block.

divider.description: If true, draw a horizontal rule above this block.

src.description: Image path relative to the terminal's assets folder (e.g. 'assets/photo.png'). Stored in data/<terminal-id>/assets/.

revealStyle.description: How the image reveals: 'pixelate' progressively increases resolution, 'none' shows immediately.

blendMode.description: Canvas composite operation for the image.

palette.description: Color palette mapping mode. Null for original colors.

width.description: Display width in pixels. Height scales proportionally. Omit for natural size.

divider.description: If true, draw a horizontal rule above this block.
